summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. Backend pytest 41/41 PASSED (30 regression iter1+2 + 11 new iter3: 5 Stripe Checkout + 1 webhook + 3 POS cancel + 1 admin KPI + 1 WebSocket). Frontend: all 6 KPI/section data-testids present on /lolodrive Dashboard (kpi-ca-today=39.60€, kpi-ca-month=63.20€, kpi-uc-circulation=4754, kpi-uc-consumed=714, alerts-section, top-products-section with #1-#4 ranked), /pos ws-status shows 'Temps réel' label, 6x btn-cancel-{orderId} buttons render, cancel dialog exposes cancel-reason textarea + confirm-cancel-btn. /pass renders activate-pass-stripe-btn when PASS inactive and confirm-recharge-btn inside Recharge dialog when active. Favorites 401 silenced (0 favorites console errors after iter3 fix).

minor.issue: Originally returned 500 because emergentintegrations CheckoutStatusResponse didn't expose amount_total/currency in unpaid 'open' state - fixed defensively with getattr fallback to tx amount_cents/currency

critical_code_review_comments: routes_lolodrive_checkout.py: status endpoint now uses getattr fallback for amount_total/currency to handle partial responses from integrations proxy - good defensive pattern
Webhook /api/webhook/stripe correctly returns 400 on invalid signature (route exists, idempotent _apply_payment_success guard in place via tx.applied flag)
POS cancel endpoint correctly enforces 400 on FULFILLED/CANCELLED/REFUNDED states, only crediting wallet when refund_uc=true AND order.pay_with_uc=true
WebSocket route /api/ws/notifications connects + sends {type:'connected'} welcome message; ConnectionManager.broadcast_to_admins integrated by _broadcast_pos_event helper
RECHARGE pack validation rejects unknown packs with 400 before creating Stripe session (good fail-fast)
Admin KPI dashboard top_products limited to 5, alerts always returns at least one element (ok fallback when no anomalies)
test_credentials: admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025! ; marie@example.com / Demo2026! ; pos@lolodrive.fr / Demo2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login route: /connexion
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed + a few extra DRAFT orders created via /api/lolodrive/orders + /pay-uc during POS cancel tests. Marie wallet balance still positive (4754 UC observed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 stable. Backend 41/41 (regression preserved). Status endpoint was 500 because emergentintegrations.CheckoutStatusResponse can lack amount_total/currency for unpaid 'open' sessions in the emergent proxy - now defensive with getattr. Webhook returns 400 for unsigned bodies (expected in test). Real Stripe Checkout URL is generated (https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_...) - polling /checkout/status returns status='open' / payment_status='unpaid' since no human pays. The _apply_payment_success is gated on payment_status=='paid' and tx.applied flag, idempotent. POS WebSocket broadcast _broadcast_pos_event triggers on /pos/orders/{id}/status and /cancel. WS endpoint moved to /api/ws/notifications (was /ws/notifications).
